doc_content.summary: The stark-pr-status skill generates a comprehensive PR analytics dashboard by combining real-time GitHub API data with local stark-review history. It visualizes review rounds, findings by severity, signal-vs-noise ratios, and cycle times, and provides actionable suggestions based on PR health.
key_features: Single PR detailed dashboard (timeline, participants, finding severity, noise analysis)
Repository-wide PR summary across open, closed, or merged states
Integrates GitHub metadata with historical AI review data
Actionable smart routing to other stark skills based on PR condition (e.g., stagnant PRs, noisy reviews)

alt_text: A visualization of the stark-pr-status skill workflow, showing inputs, script execution pulling from GitHub API and local history, output rendering modes, and smart suggestions routing based on PR conditions.
